questionHtml: Write down the conclusion to the test. Give a reason for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
0.0952>0.05                    R1

there is insufficient evidence to reject H0                    A1

Note: Do not award R0A1. The answer to part (d) MUST follow through from their hypotheses seen in part (b) and their p-value seen in part (c); if hypotheses are incorrect/reversed, etc., the answer to part (d) must reflect this in order for the A1 to be credited.

[2 marks]
